text: Adopting a pet is a quiet act of faith in the future. You are promising to show up, day after ordinary day, for a creature who cannot say thank you in words but will tell you in a thousand other ways. May your home grow louder, warmer, a little more chaotic, and immeasurably richer. There is nothing quite like being chosen back by something you have chosen to love. Welcome to the beautiful, muddy-pawed adventure ahead. Congratulations.
